data.content: Plan complete. Root cause: useRehydrateTerminals short-circuits when localStorage is empty, never fetching backend sessions. Fix: (1) remove the early-return guard so listSessions() always runs, (2) set panelOpen=true in computeRehydrate when orphan running sessions are discovered. 2 files changed (~15 lines), plus unit and E2E tests. Existing orphan-recovery and SSE sync infrastructure handles the rest.
